\tzpentry{ID3533}{Quantum Quantum State Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3533 introduces Quantum Quantum State Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi(x_1,x_2,t)=\mathcal N\,e^{-((x_1+x_2)/2)^2/(2\sigma_R^2)}\; \big|x_1-x_2\big|^{|\ell|} e^{-(x_1-x_2)^2/(2\sigma_r(t)^2)} e^{i\ell\theta(r)}\times \int e^{\tfrac{i}{\hbar}p(x_1-x_2+x_0)}\tilde A(p)\,dp . \]
